title: lastrea aemula
intro: Lastrea aemula, also known as the Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea aemula include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Lastrea aemula typically involve drying and processing the plant's fronds, which can be made into teas, infusions, or used in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
